name: after-school-planner
description: Mobile-first bilingual after-school activity planner packaged with Capacitor for Android.

scripts.cap:sync: npm.cmd run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug: npm.cmd run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: npm.cmd run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
